programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: In Mintabie, the pressure mounts for The Tunnel Rats as rival miners move in on their area; in Sheepyards, The Bushmen are forced to enter an abandoned mine to remove a dead animal; rookies The Poms search for a prize opal to begins their career.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: The carvers create and race cars, while the Master Carve pairs them up in a team challenge; they must work together or face the axe.

programme.title: A Cut Above
programme.desc: As the challenges grow more difficult, the carvers test their resilience with a jam session, making musical instruments out of wood; the "Master Carve" leaves the competitors spinning as they create fantastical carousel animals ready to ride.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: A yearling escapes from the shelter while Tanja is out on a remote release.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: The three rowdiest yearlings must be trapped; a second moose calf arrives with injuries identical to the one that just passed.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A young photographer has important evidence of a bank holdup.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps find a hijacked truckload of diamonds.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Heli-loggers are deep into their winter season on Vancouver Island; rain and fog threaten to strand two fallers on the hill; a crew races to get the wood out before the spring thaw turns the block road to mush.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: A tiny marsupial in the form of a carnivorous chuditch starts to be problematic at feeding time; seven Asian elephants and their enclosure receive a thorough cleaning and they certainly make their presence known.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The fishing season could end at any moment and tensions are at an all-time high.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A young photographer has important evidence of a bank holdup.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: Hobo helps find a hijacked truckload of diamonds.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Phoebe arrives with two broken legs; Ilana tries working with a horse who is afraid of people.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with two paralyzed back legs returns; the team gets ready for the garden-themed festival.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob assesses a dog at risk of being put down; Tony and Moby gain some interest from families.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob starts training 18 pitbull mixes in Florida; Danielle is worried about the health of a draft horse.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle travel to Israel to rescue dogs; a family meets a dog that they've been longing for; a visit to some pigs on a farm.

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with amputated front paws arrives; Ilana trims an energetic foal's hooves; Danielle gets a special visit.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: The Taronga Zoo attempts to create history by successfully exporting two platypuses to America.

programme.title: Biggest & Baddest
programme.desc: Niall investigates the impact of human living conditions on the leopard's choice of prey and the conflict with the people of Mumbai.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen face off against a miner who has illegally dug on their claim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Tunnel Rats deal with an unexploded bomb and hazardous gases; The Bros attempt to fit their equipment into a new mine; The Poms make their first trip underground.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: As Bill, captain of the Bounty Hunter, struggles to stay out of the red, Dave gives him false advice that sends him farther away from the fish.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A blackmailer threatens to expose an unsavory incident from a celebrity's past.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A runaway boy is reunited with the family that wants to adopt him.

programme.desc: Niall investigates the impact of human living conditions on the leopard's choice of prey and the conflict with the people of Mumbai.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, Taronga vets get up close to a silverback gorilla.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: On the last day, the fleet battles the bar and each other in search of the winning fish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A blackmailer threatens to expose an unsavory incident from a celebrity's past.

programme.title: The Littlest Hobo
programme.desc: A runaway boy is reunited with the family that wants to adopt him.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri visits her longstanding cattle clients, many of whom have been farming the land for multiple generations.

programme.title: Dr. Keri: Prairie Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Keri looks after her senior patients, and the emotional responsibility that comes with ensuring all pets have a good quality of life, as she deals with her own dog Two Bit's cancer diagnosis.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Two young vets join the RAPS team and there's lots to do; a hairless Sphynx cat is plagued by vomiting; Kai, a spirited three-legged rescue dog, injures her spine chasing a rat; the owner of a bearded dragon gets an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Squeak, a cute Pomeranian dog, has a permanent head tilt that makes everyone go in circles; an adorable kitten with a serious birth defect means a race against time; Dr. Martinez examines a rare albino hedgehog.

programme.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programme.desc: As the largest bushfires on record devastate the country, Taronga Zoo vets take the battle to save Australian native wildlife to the front line.

programme.title: Mega Zoo
programme.desc: In the Savannah, Dr. Bonnie must perform a critical surgery on zebra Zaide's badly damaged tail; tiger Indrah gets an incredible 10th birthday surprise; Dr. Sarah is determined to solve spider monkey Isobella's medical mystery.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Storms hit the Gemfields and Max fights his way to the lease, but the floods may have destroyed his dam.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: With water in the dam, Max and Glenn finally get a break, but their machines break down; Todd and Brianna face a phobia and a dangerous situation while the Mifsuds' season might end with a family feud.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Marciano of Hard Merchandise comes home empty-handed; Bill and Ralph team up to teach Dave and Tuna.com a lesson.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Dr. Keri visits her longstanding cattle clients, many of whom have been farming the land for multiple generations.
